
### branches are consistent (1)  {.smaller}


```
array = malloc(1024);
if (array == NULL) ...

```
 <hr />
 
<pre><code>call malloc
cmpq $0, %rax
<span data-fragment-index="2" class="fragment custom myem-only">je handle_error</span>
</code></pre>
 <hr />
 almost never taken

### branches are consistent (2)  {.smaller}


```
for (int i = 0; i != 1024; ++i)

```
 <hr />
 
<pre><code>    xorq %rax, %rax
top_of_loop:
    ...
    incq %rax
    cmpq $1024, %rax
    <span data-fragment-index="2" class="fragment custom myem-only">jne top_of_loop</span>
</code></pre>
 <hr />
 almost always taken
